sections.title: Punishment for murder
sections.description: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life, and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Punishment for culpable homicide not amounting to murder
sections.description: Whoever commits culpable homicide not amounting to murder shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment for life or up to 10 years, and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Causing death by negligence
sections.description: Whoever causes the death of any person by doing any rash or negligent act not amounting to culpable homicide, shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Dowry death
sections.description: Where the death of a woman is caused by any burns or bodily injury or occurs otherwise than under normal circumstances within seven years of her marriage and it is shown that soon before her death she was subjected to cruelty or harassment by her husband or any relative of her husband for, or in connection with, any demand for dowry.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 7 years, extendable to imprisonment for life
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Abetment of suicide
sections.description: If any person commits suicide, whoever abets the commission of such suicide, shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Attempt to murder
sections.description: Whoever does any act with such intention or knowledge, and under such circumstances that, if he by that act caused death, he would be guilty of murder.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years and fine; if hurt is caused, imprisonment for life
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Punishment for voluntarily causing hurt
sections.description: Whoever, except in the case provided for by section 334, voluntarily causes hurt, shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to Rs 1,000, or both
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Voluntarily causing hurt by dangerous weapons or means
sections.description: Whoever, except in the case provided for by section 334, voluntarily causes hurt by means of any instrument for shooting, stabbing or cutting, or any instrument which, used as a weapon of offence, is likely to cause death.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt
sections.description: Whoever, except in the case provided for by section 335, voluntarily causes grievous hurt, shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Voluntarily causing hurt to deter public servant from duty
sections.description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt to any person being a public servant in the discharge of his duty.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Act endangering life or personal safety of others
sections.description: Whoever does any act so rashly or negligently as to endanger human life or the personal safety of others.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine up to Rs 250, or both
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Causing hurt by act endangering life or personal safety of others
sections.description: Whoever causes hurt to any person by doing any act so rashly or negligently as to endanger human life or the personal safety of others.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 6 months, or fine up to Rs 500, or both
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Assault or criminal force to woman with intent to outrage her modesty
sections.description: Whoever assaults or uses criminal force to any woman, intending to outrage or knowing it to be likely that he will thereby outrage her modesty.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 1 year, up to 5 years, and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Sexual harassment and punishment for sexual harassment
sections.description: A man committing any of the following acts: physical contact and advances involving unwelcome and explicit sexual overtures, a demand or request for sexual favours, showing pornography against the will of a woman, making sexually coloured remarks.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Assault or use of criminal force to woman with intent to disrobe
sections.description: Any man who assaults or uses criminal force to any woman or abets such act with the intention of disrobing or compelling her to be naked.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 3 years, up to 7 years, and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Voyeurism
sections.description: Any man who watches, or captures the image of a woman engaging in a private act in circumstances where she would usually have the expectation of not being observed.
sections.punishment: First conviction: imprisonment 1-3 years and fine; second: imprisonment 3-7 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Stalking
sections.description: Any man who follows a woman and contacts, or attempts to contact such woman to foster personal interaction repeatedly despite a clear indication of disinterest by such woman.
sections.punishment: First conviction: imprisonment up to 3 years and fine; second: imprisonment up to 5 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Punishment for rape
sections.description: Whoever commits rape shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment of either description for a term which shall not be less than ten years, but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 10 years, extendable to life, and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Theft
sections.description: Whoever, intending to take dishonestly any moveable property out of the possession of any person without that person's consent, moves that property in order to such taking, is said to commit theft.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Extortion
sections.description: Whoever intentionally puts any person in fear of any injury to that person, or to any other, and thereby dishonestly induces the person so put in fear to deliver to any person any property or valuable security.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Punishment for robbery
sections.description: Whoever commits robbery shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Punishment for dacoity
sections.description: Whoever commits dacoity shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or with rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment for life or rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Dishonest misappropriation of property
sections.description: Whoever dishonestly misappropriates or converts to his own use any movable property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Punishment for criminal breach of trust
sections.description: Whoever commits criminal breach of trust shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Dishonestly receiving stolen property
sections.description: Whoever dishonestly receives or retains any stolen property, knowing or having reason to believe the same to be stolen property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Punishment for cheating by personation
sections.description: Whoever cheats by personation shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to five years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 5 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property
sections.description: Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces the person deceived to deliver any property to any person, or to make, alter or destroy the whole or any part of a valuable security, or anything which is signed or sealed, and which is capable of being converted into a valuable security.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Mischief
sections.description: Whoever with intent to cause, or knowing that he is likely to cause, wrongful loss or damage to the public or to any person, causes the destruction of any property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Punishment for criminal trespass
sections.description: Whoever commits criminal trespass shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees, or with both.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine up to Rs 500, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Punishment for house-trespass
sections.description: Whoever commits house-trespass shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to one year, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to Rs 1,000, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Punishment for lurking house-trespass or house-breaking
sections.description: Whoever commits lurking house-trespass or house-breaking, shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to two years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Forgery
sections.description: Whoever makes any false document or false electronic record or part of a document or electronic record, with intent to cause damage or injury.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVIII - Of Offences Relating to Documents and Property Marks

sections.title: Husband or relative of husband of a woman subjecting her to cruelty
sections.description: Whoever, being the husband or the relative of the husband of a woman, subjects such woman to cruelty shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine
sections.chapter: XXA - Of Cruelty by Husband or Relatives of Husband

sections.title: Defamation
sections.description: Whoever, by words either spoken or intended to be read, or by signs or by visible representations, makes or publishes any imputation concerning any person intending to harm, or knowing or having reason to believe that such imputation will harm, the reputation of such person.
sections.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XXI - Of Defamation

sections.title: Punishment for criminal intimidation
sections.description: Whoever commits the offence of criminal intimidation shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both; if threat to cause death or grievous hurt: imprisonment up to 7 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XXII - Of Criminal Intimidation, Insult and Annoyance

sections.title: Criminal intimidation by anonymous communication
sections.description: Whoever commits criminal intimidation by an anonymous communication, or having taken precaution to conceal the name or abode of the person from whom the threat comes.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, in addition to punishment for criminal intimidation
sections.chapter: XXII - Of Criminal Intimidation, Insult and Annoyance

sections.title: Word, gesture or act intended to insult the modesty of a woman
sections.description: Whoever, intending to insult the modesty of any woman, utters any words, makes any sound or gesture, or exhibits any object.
sections.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 3 years and fine
sections.chapter: XXII - Of Criminal Intimidation, Insult and Annoyance

sections.title: Punishment for rioting
sections.description: Whoever is guilty of rioting shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: VIII - Of Offences Against the Public Tranquillity

sections.title: Rioting, armed with deadly weapon
sections.description: Whoever is guilty of rioting, being armed with a deadly weapon or with anything which, used as a weapon of offence, is likely to cause death.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: VIII - Of Offences Against the Public Tranquillity

sections.title: Punishment for kidnapping
sections.description: Whoever kidnaps any person from India or from lawful guardianship, shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Kidnapping or abducting in order to murder
sections.description: Whoever kidnaps or abducts any person in order that such person may be murdered or may be so disposed of as to be put in danger of being murdered.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment for life or rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine
sections.chapter: XVI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Stolen property
sections.description: Property the possession whereof has been transferred by theft, or by extortion, or by robbery, and property which has been criminally misappropriated or in respect of which criminal breach of trust has been committed.
sections.punishment: N/A (definitional section)
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property
